/usr/bin/cc  -O3 -Wall -DCMSIS_MCU_H="<stdint.h>" -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_run.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_run.dir/main.c.o CMakeFiles/test_run.dir/common/array.c.o CMakeFiles/test_run.dir/common/queue.c.o CMakeFiles/test_run.dir/common/trace.c.o CMakeFiles/test_run.dir/imlib/imlib.c.o CMakeFiles/test_run.dir/imlib/hough.c.o CMakeFiles/test_run.dir/imlib/fmath.c.o CMakeFiles/test_run.dir/imlib/edge.c.o CMakeFiles/test_run.dir/imlib/mathop.c.o CMakeFiles/test_run.dir/imlib/fast.c.o CMakeFiles/test_run.dir/imlib/point.c.o CMakeFiles/test_run.dir/imlib/rectangle.c.o CMakeFiles/test_run.dir/imlib/collections.c.o CMakeFiles/test_run.dir/imlib/sincos_tab.c.o CMakeFiles/test_run.dir/imlib/xyz_tab.c.o -o test_run  -lm
